nodes.label: AI as productivity tool for repetitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I've been trying to use AI as much as possible to become more productive

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness with well-formatted data
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I feel like I can't trust the results AI gives me if the data I put in isn't formatted in a very straightforward way

nodes.label: AI autonomy in task execution
nodes.grounding_span: I typically give it everything it needs up front by uploading all the data at hand and write a prompt to let it know exactly what to do and then let it complete the task independently

nodes.label: AI adoption in traditional workplace
nodes.grounding_span: My law firm is very old school, as most law firms are

nodes.label: Confidentiality and data security in AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about confidentiality and data security

nodes.label: Productivity and time efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: if I have to stop to go through data by hand, I end of working many more hours

nodes.label: Reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I feel like I can't trust the results AI gives me

nodes.label: Autonomy and control over work
nodes.grounding_span: I would love it if AI could take over

nodes.label: Confidentiality and compliance
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about confidentiality and data security

nodes.label: Frustration with AI on messy data
nodes.grounding_span: the AI sometimes seems to get confused reading this type of data and then gives me garbage results

nodes.label: Desire for full automation
nodes.grounding_span: I would love it if AI could take over

nodes.label: Concern about confidentiality
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about confidentiality and data security

nodes.label: Preference for upfront comprehensive instruction
nodes.grounding_span: I typically give it everything it needs up front by uploading all the data at hand and write a prompt to let it know exactly what to do

nodes.label: Pragmatic fallback to manual methods when AI fails
nodes.grounding_span: I will usually have to do things the old way, by hand if I don't trust the results
